title: post api auth signup user creation
description: Test user account creation by sending POST request to /api/auth/signup with valid email and password, expecting 201 response with user_id.

title: post api auth login valid credentials
description: Test user login by sending POST request to /api/auth/login with valid credentials, expecting 200 response with session_token in response body.

title: get api profile authorized access
description: Test fetching user profile by sending GET request to /api/profile with valid Authorization header containing session_token, expecting 200 response with user profile data.

title: post api projects create project authorized
description: Test creating a new project by sending POST request to /api/projects with valid Authorization header and project data, expecting 201 response with project_id.

title: post api vaults push encrypted blob
description: Test pushing encrypted vault blob by sending POST request to /api/vaults/{project_id}/{env_id}/push with valid Authorization and encrypted_blob, expecting 200 acknowledgement.

title: post api projects secrets create secret metadata
description: Test creating secret metadata by sending POST request to /api/projects/{project_id}/secrets with valid Authorization and encrypted secret data, expecting 201 response with secret_id.

title: post api projects invites create invite
description: Test inviting a collaborator by sending POST request to /api/projects/{project_id}/invites with valid Authorization and invitee email and role, expecting 201 response with invite_id and invite_token.

title: post api projects ci tokens create ci token
description: Test creating a scoped CI token by sending POST request to /api/projects/{project_id}/ci-tokens with valid Authorization and token details, expecting 201 response with token_id and one-time token_value.

title: get api projects audit logs authorized
description: Test retrieving audit logs by sending GET request to /api/projects/{project_id}/audit-logs with valid Authorization, expecting 200 response with list of audit events.

title: post api projects webhooks register webhook
description: Test registering a webhook by sending POST request to /api/projects/{project_id}/webhooks with valid Authorization and webhook URL and events, expecting 201 response with webhook_id.
